svg.title: Curio — Data Catalog Browse
svg.desc: Data Catalog browse view with install dynamics. Left category rail, 2×3 card grid of catalog datasets with operational metadata rows, right detail drawer for selected dataset. Visual identity: Rubik, #1E1F23 dark, #FBAA69 accent.

g.text: Points of interest — cafés, parks, transit,
Parks, gardens, urban forests and green
